title: Anatomy of a Blockchain Transaction Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step journey of a transaction from initiation to being added to the immutable blockchain ledger, highlighting key concepts like hashing, digital signatures, and consensus.
relationships: User creates and signs a transaction
Miner/Validator selects transactions for a block
Block is proposed to the network
Network reaches consensus on block validity
Valid block is appended to the chain
Ledger state is updated for all nodes
